content: CCTV footage from Anil Chatterjee’s residence (2017): No cameras were installed inside the house. External camera at gate shows Priya entering on 12/03/2017 at 10:15 AM. Mrs. Anjali Ghosh does not appear on camera that day. Footage shows Mrs. Ghosh entering her own house at 10:30 AM on 15/03/2017 — confirming she was hospitalized on 12/03/2017. Boundary stone installation on 15/01/2023: Footage from nearby shop shows Priya’s hired contractor, Raju Singh, moving two stones with a tractor at 8:00 AM. Priya is visible at the site at 8:45 AM, handing him cash. No official surveyor present.
